creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
i have problem with issue in qtcreator

Name           : qtcreator
Version        : 4.13.1
Installed on   : Sat Oct 10 20:57:23 2020 CEST
Origin         : devel/qtcreator
Architecture   : FreeBSD:12:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : devel
Licenses       : QtGPL
Maintainer     : kde@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://qt-project.org/wiki/Category:Tools::QtCreator

This is information from qtcreator:
